# Integrity-pinned npm release fixture

`npm-11.17.0.tgz` is the unmodified npm 11.17.0 package distribution from:

`https://registry.npmjs.org/npm/-/npm-11.17.0.tgz`

Its canonical registry integrity is:

`sha512-PurxiZexEHDTE4SSaLI3ZrnbAGiZfeyUcQcxcP5D+hfytNAze/D1IzDuInTn9XVLIbAQUnQuSPXJx02LHjLvQw==`

license as `Artistic-2.0`.
